The AFL is Australia's top pro Aussie Rules league. Founded in 1897 as the VFL, it has 18 teams. The season ends with the Grand Final at MCG.

The Australian Rules Football League is the highest-level professional competition in the sport of Australian Rules football. The league was founded as the Victorian Football League in 1897 consisting of only six breakaway teams – today 18 teams play in 23 rounds, with the top-eight clubs qualifying for the finals playoff series. The season culminates with the Grand Final at the Melbourne Cricket Ground, where the top two teams compete for the premiership.

The AFL is the top professional league in Australian Rules football, founded in 1897 as the Victorian Football League. Originally, it had six teams; now there are 18. They play 23 rounds, and the top eight qualify for the finals. The season ends with the Grand Final at Melbourne Cricket Ground, where the top two teams vie for the premiership.
Aussie Rules top league: 18 teams.
The AFL is Australia's top Aussie Rules league, with 18 teams and a Grand Final.

The Australian Rules Football League started as the Victorian Football League in 1897 with six teams. Today, it has 18 teams competing in 23 rounds, culminating in finals where the top eight teams vie for the premiership.

programDetails.airingNetwork: FOX Sports Digital - FS1, FOX Net Mountain, FSD - 09, FOX Sports Digital - FS2, SiriusXM, FOX Net East/Central, FOX Sports 2, FOX Net Pacific, FOX Sports Digital - FBC Sports, FOX Sports 1, FBC Sports

programSynopsis.synopsis: Colin Cowherd gives authentic opinions on the biggest sports stories of the day.
A thought-provoking, opinionated, and topic-driven journey through the top sports stories of the day.

"The Herd With Colin Cowherd" is a three-hour sports television show hosted by Colin Cowherd and Jason McIntyre; Cowherd, a veteran broadcaster with over 20 years of experience in the sports television and radio field, is joined by longtime writer and gambling analyst McIntyre. Cowherd and McIntrye regularly provides viewers with authentic, unfiltered opinions on the day's biggest sports topics, joined regularly by special guests including athletes, legends, and analysts.
Colin Cowherd gives authentic opinions on the biggest sports stories of the day.
A thought-provoking, opinionated, and topic-driven journey through the top sports stories of the day.

After building up a following -- and, at times, controversy -- for over a decade at ESPN Radio, opinionated host Colin Cowherd has brought his midday talk show, "The Herd," to the FOX Sports family. This FS1 simulcast of the daily FOX Sports Radio program features Cowherd's sometimes-polarizing, but always-bold, commentary on the latest happenings in the world of sports... and beyond. He also welcomes athletes, analysts, beat writers and other guests to share their thoughts on the hot topics of the day. With the move to FS1 also comes a move back to the West Coast for the Washington-born Cowherd, who hosts the show in Los Angeles after being based in Connecticut with his previous employer.
Colin Cowherd and co-host Jason McIntyre break down the biggest stories and interview the biggest guests in sports.

The NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series returns to Rockingham Speedway for the Black's Tire 200. This is the first time the trucks have raced at the Rock since 2013. Chandler Smith earned his first win of the season at Bristol Motor Speedway on April 11.
The NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series returns to Rockingham Speedway for the Black's Tire 200.
Trucks battle fiercely in the NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series for wins and a championship chance.

These trucks don’t play nice. It’s a battle to the finish full of nonstop, paint-on-paint action in the NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series. Fender bending rivalries. Behind the pit wall action. The NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series returns to Rockingham Speedway for the Black's Tire 200. This is the first time the trucks have raced at the Rock since 2013. Chandler Smith earned his first win of the season at Bristol Motor Speedway on April 11.
The NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series returns to Rockingham Speedway for the Black's Tire 200.
Trucks battle fiercely in the NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series for wins and a championship chance.

These trucks don’t play nice. It’s a battle to the finish full of nonstop, paint-on-paint action in the NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series. Fender bending rivalries. Behind the pit wall action. A heart-pounding view from the driver’s seat.  We watch as Truck Series teams battle for the win and ultimately a shot at the championship.

programSynopsis.synopsis: The Renegades run into the Stallions. Arlington is 2-0, holding in-state foes San Antonio and Houston to nine points apiece in separate victories. Birmingham raises a championship banner for the third consecutive year when including its USFL titles.
Week 3 in the UFL gets underway with Arlington (2-0) visiting defending champion Birmingham (1-1).

The Brahmas face the Renegades in a season opener from Choctaw Stadium. Head coach Wade Phillips led San Antonio to a 7-3 record in 2024, which included two wins over in-state rival Arlington. The Renegades sported an inverse 3-7 record last season.
